title: fault lines
body:
fault line lyrics

listen
i'm out here spittin cuz i'm gettin in touch with people
that's my mission
do you
it's cool
but please excuse these bricks
i'm building a cathedral with acoustics louder than boomsticks
out in the boondocks cuz that's how my mind rocks
when i'm on the time clock try not to grind rocks
climb until i top
dive until i stop
move until i drop
the truth is a liar
the roof is on fire
but we don't need water
it's a funeral pyre for a feudal empire
and i'm proud of the future
i can see that it's brighter
i see with my eyes closed, i know i'm a writer
the trush about my flow, i know i'm a liar
but wherever i go the water gets higher
that's how i know i'm alright
i know i'm not right but i know i'm alright
that's where i go when i write
that's where i go when i'm wrong
i'm not just going along not knowing the song
i need to sing to survive the salt mine
how the fuck else we gonna find the fault line
climb to the surface
see if it's worth it
to walk on our own two
with personal purpose
